# Unbrewed

> Unbrewed is a free, open-source, browser-based simulator for playing Unmatched
> board game fan decks online. No accounts, no installs, no cost. It imports decks
> from unmatched.cards and the-unmatched.club, as well as Tabletop Simulator (TTS)
> exports, and turns any image URL into a custom battle map. Two players connect to
> a shared lobby and play head-to-head. It is an unofficial hobby project and is not
> affiliated with Restoration Games, the publisher of Unmatched.

## Pages
- [Home](https://unbrewed.xyz/): overview and a four-step getting-started guide
- [Deck bag](https://unbrewed.xyz/bag): import and manage decks and custom maps
- [Connect](https://unbrewed.xyz/connect): create or join a game lobby to play

## Key facts
- Price: Free (open-source, MIT-licensed)
- Account required: No
- Runs in: Any modern web browser (desktop or mobile)
- Deck sources: unmatched.cards, the-unmatched.club, Tabletop Simulator exports, raw JSON, image URLs
- Maps: any image URL
- Multiplayer: two players share a lobby name

## Source
- [GitHub](https://github.com/JollyGrin/unbrewed-p2p): source code and issue tracker
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/qPxHFjwkNN): community and support
